name: Western Union Money Order Only
description_short: Las Vegas, NV: Western Union Money Order Only at 5095 S Decatur Blvd stays open 24/7 for money orders.
description_long:
Western Union Money Order Only at 5095 S Decatur Blvd in Las Vegas, NV operates as a standalone location specializing in money orders and cash transfers. This Las Vegas facility is open 24 hours every day of the week, providing convenient access whenever you need to send or receive money.

At this Las Vegas location, you can send domestic and international money orders, receive wire transfers, and conduct basic financial transactions. Call +1 702-365-8802 to confirm service availability or ask about fees. The staff can assist with questions about money order limits and transfer options.

If you're in the Las Vegas area and need a quick, reliable way to send money, this 24/7 location offers convenient access. Bring a valid ID and the recipient's details. The facility is known among Las Vegas residents for straightforward, same-day money order service.
address: 5095 S Decatur Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89118

company_info.headquarters: 5095 S Decatur Blvd, Las Vegas, NV 89118

pros: No bank account or credit card required to purchase or use money orders
Widely accepted for bill payments, especially rent and recurring expenses where checks are rejected
Extensive network of physical locations for accessibility to unbanked consumers
Money orders do not expire, providing long-term validity
Can pay via cash or debit card depending on local location policies
Online money order refund request process available for purchasers with receipts
Prepaid format prevents overdraft fees and guarantees fund availability
cons: Fees charged at purchase vary by location with no transparent upfront pricing disclosed
Not all Western Union locations can cash money orders despite selling them, requiring customers to find alternative cashing locations
States may deduct non-refundable service charges after 1-3 years of non-use, reducing the principal amount
Refund requests incur additional unspecified fees beyond the original purchase fee
Requires in-person visits to purchase and often to cash, creating inconvenience compared to digital payment methods
best_for: Unbanked or underbanked consumers who need a payment method without opening a checking account
Renters and tenants paying property managers who reject personal checks
Customers who prefer not to send cash or use digital payment methods
People making secure purchases or gifting funds to friends and family
diagnosis: Western Union money orders are best for unbanked consumers and traditional bill payers (especially renters) who need a check alternative without a bank account. The main caveat is that variable location-based fees, inconsistent cashing availability across branches, and the in-person requirement make this slower and less transparent than digital payment alternatives.
services: Money order purchase at physical Western Union locations
Payment via cash or debit card for money order purchases
Money order cashing at participating banks and retailers
Money order deposit into bank accounts
Money order status tracking using receipts
Secure fund transfers to friends and family
Location finder tool to identify nearby Western Union offices offering money order services
Step-by-step guidance on filling out money orders
Receipt issuance for refund and status tracking purposes
Customer support at participating Western Union agent locations
